title: Baron Discovery Fund adds WAY, CWST, GLIBR, and FROG
content:
* Baron Discovery Fund underperformed with a return of 0.19% in Q4 2025, compared to the returns of 1.03%  for the Russell 2000 Growth Index for the same period.
 	* In Q4 2025, the fund initiated new positions in Waystar Holding (NASDAQ:WAY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WAY]) and Casella Waste Systems (NASDAQ:CWST [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CWST]), GCI Liberty (NASDAQ:GLIBR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GLIBR]), and JFrog (NASDAQ:FROG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FROG]) to its holdings.
 	* Source [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4870037-baron-discovery-fund-q4-2025-shareholder-letter].

MORE ON BARON DISCOVERY FUND

 	* Baron Discovery Fund Q4 2025 Shareholder Letter [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4870037-baron-discovery-fund-q4-2025-shareholder-letter]
 	* Seeking Alpha’s Quant Rating on Baron Discovery Fund [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BDFFX/ratings/quant-ratings]
